events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate described field condition. The scenario: progress photos for Cable tray show current checkpoint scope finished. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference NEC Art. 392. Stage rough-complete. No component condition categories flagged. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since description says scope finished, remaining minor cleanup/finish outside scored checkpoint. No defects described. So decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 95? Since rough-complete and remaining cleanup/labeling outside checkpoint. Value 0. Component_conditions empty. Findings empty. Actions maybe none or note complete cleanup/labeling. Rationale: checkpoint scope complete, no visible defects, NEC Art 392 cable tray installation appears satisfied based on provided info. References NEC Art. 392. Need include all fields. Sound_source, event_time, rate, order, workable can be empty/0. Need valid JSON.
